description.value:
A heavy chopping sword of island origin, with a broad serrated blade that both deflects incoming blows and punishes enemies who close in. Its weight makes it unforgiving but powerful.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Heavy, Melee d8, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Heavy, Melee d10, Deflect, Punch
MasterOne-Handed, Heavy, Melee d10, Deflect, Punch â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkDeflect now works against ranged attacks. Knockback and Trip effects from this weapon benefit from the Keen property.
